{{Infobox construct
| name = rune-lights
| introduced = Skysworn
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Rune-lights are illumination sources powered by [[scripts]] or runes. They can appear as glowing circles on walls, such as those used to mimic windows in [[stone]] rooms, or as lights embedded in ceilings. While they are typically found in various colors, they can also manifest as identical white lights. These light sources require maintenance to remain functional; if neglected for long periods, they may become damaged or flicker. Additionally, these [[scripts]] can be activated or deactivated by users, and in some instances, they are capable of producing significant energy when triggered.}}

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The hallways are lit by flickering, damaged [[rune-lights]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c3">''Skysworn'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The hallway has pale white [[rune-lights]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c11">''Skysworn'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Mercy]] deactivated the [[rune-lights]] in her office.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c8">''Dreadgod'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[rune-lights{{!}}Rune-lights]] are usually many different colors.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c15">''Dreadgod'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
